obs1.description: Same route and same subsequent choices; only the first-node option varies. Measures how much a single early decision shifts the win rate.
obs1.hypothesis: early-node resource swing disproportionately influences run survivability
obs1.interpretation: First node creates strong win-rate divergence — early choice dominates.

obs2.description: All choices set to option 1 (cautious/safe) across 20 seeds on the north route. Tests whether pure risk-avoidance is a viable strategy.
obs2.interpretation: Conservative play is not a safe default — players must engage with risk.

obs3.description: Aggressive (all option 0) vs Conservative (all option 1) across 50 seeds × 2 routes = 100 runs per group.
obs3.hypothesis: high-risk options over-perform relative to conservative options
obs3.interpretation: Risk and conservative paths are comparably viable — tension balance is healthy.

design_signals.signal: First-node choice creates 60% win-rate divergence. Early resource swing strongly influences run economy.
design_signals.recommended_action: Preserve early node weight. Ensure first-node options are legible.

design_signals.signal: Conservative win rate = 0%. Risk avoidance is not a safe default — players must engage with risk.
design_signals.recommended_action: No immediate action. Monitor if conservative win rate drops below 0.3.

design_signals.signal: Risk vs conservative balance is within tolerance: win_gap=+15%, net_score_gap=-2.0.
design_signals.recommended_action: No rebalancing needed. Proceed to PT-2 with current settings.
